When you see someone with a problem (visa, legal, emergency), share your unique link. When they call a lawyer or expat helper, you earn {clientCallRange}$. That's it!
chatter.faq.a2: It depends on your activity. Each call via your link earns you {clientCallRange}$. Build a team: you earn {n1}$/call from your direct recruits (N1) and {n2}$/call from their recruits (N2). Top chatters earn $500-2000/month.
chatter.faq.a3: Expat helpers are experienced expats who provide practical advice and guidance. They're not lawyers, but they know the local system well and can help with everyday questions about visas, administration, housing, etc.

chatter.faq.a5: Withdraw anytime once you reach $30. We support Wise (worldwide), Orange Money, Wave, MTN MoMo, M-Pesa, Airtel Money, and bank transfers. Payments processed within 48 hours.
chatter.faq.a6: No! You don't give advice. You just connect people who need help with our lawyers and expat helpers. You're a connector, not an expert.
chatter.faq.a7: Recruit other chatters with your special link. You earn {n1}$/call from your direct recruits (N1), and {n2}$/call from their recruits (N2). Your team size is unlimited!

faq.a1: Consultations with our qualified lawyers start from €49 for 20 minutes. For an exchange with an experienced expatriate, the rate is €19 for 30 minutes. No hidden fees, secure payment. You can choose your currency (EUR or USD).
faq.a2: SOS Expat operates in 197 countries worldwide. We connect 304 million expatriates with local lawyers and experts speaking 9 languages: French, English, German, Russian, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, and Hindi.
faq.a3: Our SOS service operates 24/7. An expert or lawyer calls you back in less than 5 minutes, wherever you are in the world. Ideal for administrative, legal, or medical emergencies during your expatriation.
faq.a4: Choose an experienced expatriate for practical daily advice (housing, procedures, integration). Opt for a qualified lawyer for complex legal questions (contracts, disputes, international law). If in doubt, our advisors can guide you.
faq.a5: Yes, absolutely. All consultations are strictly confidential and secure. Lawyers are bound by professional secrecy. Your personal data is protected in accordance with GDPR and encrypted end-to-end.
faq.a6: If you're not satisfied with your consultation, contact our support within 24 hours. We will analyze your request and propose a suitable solution: free new consultation or partial refund depending on the case. Your satisfaction is our priority.
faq.answer1: On average, you are connected with a lawyer or experienced expatriate in less than 5 minutes, 24/7.
faq.answer2: SOS Expat covers over 197 countries with local experts speaking 9 different languages.
faq.answer3: You choose the type of expert (lawyer or expatriate), make the secure payment, and are called back in less than 5 minutes by an available expert.

faq.login.a1: You can log in using your Google account (quick 1-click login) or with your email address and password. The Google button is available at the top of the form for instant login.
faq.login.a2: Click on the 'Forgot password?' link below the login form. You will receive an email with a link to securely reset your password. The process takes less than 1 minute.
faq.login.a3: Yes, Google login uses the OAuth 2.0 protocol, one of the most secure authentication systems in the world. Your data is protected and we never store your Google password.
faq.login.a4: Yes, check the 'Remember me' box before logging in. You will stay logged in even after closing your browser. For your security, don't check this option on a shared device.
faq.login.a5: Yes, your SOS Expats account is accessible from any device (smartphone, tablet, computer). Simply log in with your credentials on each device.
faq.login.a6: First check your spam/junk folder. If the email still isn't there after 5 minutes, use the 'Forgot password' option to receive a new link. Make sure the email address is correct.
faq.login.a7: Click on the 'Create an account' link at the bottom of the login page. Registration takes less than 30 seconds with Google, or 1 minute with email and password. You will immediately have access to all our services.
faq.login.a8: Absolutely. SOS Expats uses SSL/TLS encryption for all connections, complies with European GDPR, and never shares your data with third parties. Your information is stored securely and confidentially.

partner.landing.v2.faq.a1: SOS-Call for Business is a B2B program where your organisation pays a monthly subscription to SOS-Expat to embed our legal and expat service into your customer offering. Concretely, your customers reach lawyers and expat experts in 197 countries, 24/7, through your usual channel (your site, app, customer area, CRM). You do not run the service: we handle calls, lawyer payouts and support. You receive a single monthly invoice.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a2: Each partnership is built bespoke. Based on your sector, your estimated volume and your needs, we agree the formula together (per-member, flat fee, tiered or custom), the onboarding modality for your clients (manual addition via dashboard, bulk CSV import, or REST API sync from your CRM), the commercial terms and the duration. All terms are recorded in an Order Form signed electronically, alongside the B2B Terms and the GDPR/CCPA/LGPD-compliant DPA.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a3: You access a real-time partner dashboard: calls placed, duration, language, request type, consolidated KPIs. Everything is transparent. You can export to CSV or plug our events API into your internal BI.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a4: Three modalities to choose from depending on your technical maturity: (1) manual addition or CSV import from your partner dashboard, (2) REST API with Bearer authentication (granular scopes, bulk import up to 500 clients per call, ideal for syncing from your CRM), (3) activation email fully customisable to your brand, automatically sent to each client with their access code. A dedicated account manager supports you technically.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a5: Tour operators, travel agencies, cruise lines, concierge services, works councils, travel and expat insurers, embassies, consulates, banks, fintech, mutual insurers, movers, relocation firms, law firms, federations and associations, international schools, digital nomad platforms, corporates and international groups. Any organisation in regular contact with travelers, holidaymakers, tourists, digital nomads, expats, students or professionals on international assignment.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a7: The per-member formula has no minimum volume. The flat fee and tiered formulas suit larger volumes. Whether you have 50 or 50,000 customers, we find an adapted formula.

press.about.description: Launched in August 2025, SOS-Expat is the first instant help platform for expatriates, travelers, vacationers and digital nomads facing any type of difficulty abroad: legal issues, administrative problems, emergencies, scams, local disputes, lost documents, or simply needing advice. In under 5 minutes, users are connected by call with a local lawyer or trusted expat helper who speaks their language.

press.faq.a1: SOS-Expat is an instant help platform for expatriates, travelers, vacationers and digital nomads. In under 5 minutes, we connect users by call with a local lawyer or trusted expat helper, anywhere in the world, in their language.
press.faq.a2: Mission 1: Instant help — we help expatriates and travelers facing difficulties anywhere in the world. Mission 2: Guaranteed income — we enable lawyers and expat helpers to earn revenue with prepaid calls.
press.faq.a3: Users call from the website or app. In under 5 minutes, they’re connected with a verified professional or helper, speaking their language, in their timezone. Guaranteed call, secure payment.

press.faq.a7: Yes. Some press releases are distributed under embargo. The embargo lift date and time are clearly stated on each document. We ask media partners to honor these conditions to maintain exclusive early access to our information.
press.faq.a8: Launched in August 2025, SOS-Expat is an early-stage startup with over 10,000 clients helped and 100+ active providers in 197 countries. For detailed figures or exclusive data, download our press kit or contact our team directly.

registerClient.faq.a1: Click on 'Create an account', fill in the form with your email, choose a secure password, select the languages you speak and enter your phone number. Then accept the terms and conditions and click 'Create my account'. You will receive a confirmation email immediately.
registerClient.faq.a2: Yes, registration on SOS-Expat is 100% free and without commitment. You don't need a credit card to create your account. You can access all basic services for free.
registerClient.faq.a3: Yes, you can use the 'Continue with Google' button at the top of the form for quick one-click registration. Your information will be automatically retrieved from your Google account securely.
registerClient.faq.a4: SOS-Expat currently supports 9 languages: French, English, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi and Mandarin Chinese. You can select multiple languages you speak during registration to find professionals who communicate in your language.
registerClient.faq.a5: Absolutely. We use bank-level SSL/TLS encryption to protect your data. We strictly comply with European GDPR and your data is never shared with third parties without your explicit consent. You can delete your account and data at any time.
registerClient.faq.a6: Yes, you can modify all your information (email, phone, languages, profile photo, etc.) from your personal dashboard at any time. You have full control over your data.
registerClient.faq.a7: Full registration takes less than 1 minute. If you use Google sign-up, it's even faster: less than 30 seconds! You will receive a confirmation email immediately after creating your account.
registerClient.faq.a8: Our customer support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to help you. You can contact us via the Contact page or via live chat on the website. We usually respond within 48 hours.

registerExpat.faq.a1: Fill in the registration form with your information: email, password, full name, professional photo, detailed biography (minimum 50 characters), country of residence, spoken languages, countries of expertise, and your education or experience. Our team will then validate your profile.
registerExpat.faq.a2: Expat helpers are experienced expats who share practical advice and on-the-ground knowledge. Unlike lawyers, you don't need a law degree. You help with concrete questions: daily life, administrative procedures, housing, schooling, cultural adaptation, etc.
registerExpat.faq.a3: No, registration is 100% free. There are no registration or subscription fees. You pay nothing. We only take a small commission on consultations you complete through the platform. You freely set your own rates.
registerExpat.faq.a4: No, no specific degree is required. What matters is your expatriation experience and in-depth knowledge of the country where you reside. However, mentioning relevant training (languages, management, coaching, etc.) strengthens your credibility.
registerExpat.faq.a5: You can indicate all countries where you have lived or know very well. There are no limits. The more countries you cover, the more opportunities you'll have to help expats worldwide.
registerExpat.faq.a6: Yes, our team reviews all expat helper profiles to ensure service quality on the platform. We verify your expatriation experience, skills, and profile completeness. Validation usually takes 24 to 48 hours.
registerExpat.faq.a7: Absolutely. You can modify all your information (photo, biography, countries of expertise, languages, rates, availability, etc.) from your dashboard at any time. Keep your profile updated to attract more clients.
registerExpat.faq.a8: Once your profile is validated, you appear in search results based on your countries of expertise and languages. Clients call you directly through the platform. You receive calls on your phone and manage your availability in real-time from your dashboard.

registerLawyer.faq.a1: Fill in the registration form with your professional information: email, password, full name, professional photo, biography (minimum 50 characters), country of residence, spoken languages, legal specialties, countries of practice, and education. After your profile is validated by our team, you can start receiving client calls.
registerLawyer.faq.a2: Registration on SOS-Expat is completely free. You pay no registration or subscription fees. We only take a commission on consultations completed through the platform. You maintain full control over your rates and availability.
registerLawyer.faq.a3: We accept all legal specialties relevant to expats: immigration law, international labor law, cross-border family law, international business law, international tax law, overseas real estate law, and much more. You can select multiple specialties during registration.
registerLawyer.faq.a4: You can indicate all countries where you are authorized to practice law. There are no geographic limitations. The more countries you cover, the more consultation opportunities you'll have with international clients.
registerLawyer.faq.a5: Yes, absolutely. Our team verifies the authenticity of all lawyer profiles before activation. We verify your degrees, bar registration, and professional experience. This ensures quality and trust on our platform.
registerLawyer.faq.a6: Yes, you can modify all your information (photo, biography, specialties, countries of practice, languages, rates, availability, etc.) from your lawyer dashboard at any time. Your profile stays always up-to-date to attract the best clients.
registerLawyer.faq.a7: Once your registration is complete, our team reviews your profile within 24 to 48 business hours. You'll receive a confirmation email as soon as your profile is activated. If documents are missing, we'll contact you quickly.
registerLawyer.faq.a8: As soon as your profile is validated, you automatically appear in search results based on your specialties and countries of practice. Clients can call you directly through the platform. You receive calls on your phone and manage your availability in real-time.

partner.landing.v2.formulas.title: Pricing scaled to your volume
partner.landing.v2.formulas.subtitle: A single monthly subscription to offer the service to your customers. Three billing modes to choose from, plus bespoke if needed. Pricing negotiated together.
partner.landing.v2.formulas.permember.de: You pay per active customer. Ideal as your volume ramps up gradually.
partner.landing.v2.formulas.flat.title: Flat fee
partner.landing.v2.formulas.flat.desc: A fixed monthly amount regardless of volume. Ideal for predictable budgets.
partner.landing.v2.formulas.tiered.title: Tiered
partner.landing.v2.formulas.tiered.desc: Decreasing rate by customer brackets. Ideal for large volumes.
partner.landing.v2.formulas.custom.title: Bespoke
partner.landing.v2.formulas.custom.desc: Hybrid, master agreement, specific conditions: we build it with you.
partner.landing.v2.corporates.title: From the independent firm to the global group
partner.landing.v2.corporates.api.title: REST API
partner.landing.v2.corporates.api.desc: Bearer key, per-use scopes. Bulk import up to 500 customers per API call. Ideal to sync from your CRM.
Scoping by office, region, department. Each branch manager drives their scope from their own dashboard.
partner.landing.v2.corporates.invoice.de: A single monthly invoice, net 15 days (or negotiated terms). Card, transfer, direct debit.
partner.landing.v2.corporates.legal.desc: B2B Terms, DPA, Order Form signed online with audit trail (IP, timestamp, SHA-256 hash, PDF archive).
partner.landing.v2.corporates.gdpr.title: Global compliance
partner.landing.v2.corporates.gdpr.desc: DPA compliant with GDPR (EU), CCPA (California), LGPD (Brazil), PIPEDA (Canada), POPIA (South Africa), APP (Australia). Multi-region hosting, full audit trail, identified subprocessors. Built for demanding legal departments anywhere in the world.
partner.landing.v2.corporates.tracking.d: Live dashboard: call count, duration, consolidated KPIs. CSV export. Events API for internal BI integration.
partner.landing.v2.advantages.api.title: REST API + bulk import
partner.landing.v2.advantages.api.desc: Sync your customers from your CRM or ERP. Bearer key, scopes, up to 500 customers imported per API call.
partner.landing.v2.faq.a9: A single invoice is issued at month-end for the elapsed month, in line with the signed Order Form. Net 15 days by default, or negotiated terms. Card, bank transfer or SEPA direct debit. VAT receipt and invoice archive in your partner dashboard.
partner.landing.v2.faq.q10: Are the B2B Terms and DPA signed online?
partner.landing.v2.faq.a10: Yes. B2B Terms, GDPR DPA and Order Form are signed electronically with audit trail (IP, timestamp, SHA-256 hash, PDF archive). eIDAS-compliant. If your legal department prefers paper contracts, we also offer that option (admin override).
partner.landing.v2.corporates.subtitle: Independents, add your clients one by one or via CSV from the dashboard: SOS-Expat automatically sends each client their activation email with their access code. Larger groups, plug into the REST API to sync from your CRM (up to 500 clients per call) and oversee multiple firms in a unified dashboard.
